form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 59-day let-up. First-up after five months in a small field at this track on February 15 over 1408m, 4 len behind Bloody Colors Wave with 53.5kg at $10. form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 47 days. Resuming came from midfield; 2nd of 9 at this track on January 30 over 1207m, 4 len behind Critical Magic with 54kg at $23.50.
